arg.name: devices
arg.description: JSON array, each item is an object containing: "deviceType" (int, refer to DeviceType in kas-authentication-i.h), "deviceName" (string, the driver name), "deviceID" (string, unique device identifier), "objectPath" (string, D-Bus object path of this device).

arg.name: device_type
arg.description: The device type. Refer to enum DeviceType in file kas-authentication-i.h.

arg.name: devices
arg.description: JSON array, each item is an object containing: "deviceName" (string, the driver name), "deviceID" (string, unique device identifier), "objectPath" (string, D-Bus object path of this device).

arg.name: device_path
arg.description: The object path for this device.

method.name: Remove

arg.name: feature_id
arg.description: The feature is uniquely identified by feature ID (the FeatureData.featureID value that was returned during enrollment).

method.description: Remove an enrolled feature or UKey binding data from the database by feature ID.

arg.name: device_type
arg.description: Get driver information according to device type. Refer to enum DeviceType in file kas-authentication-i.h.

arg.name: drivers_info
arg.description: JSON array, each item is an object containing: "driverName" (string, the driver library name), "enable" (bool, whether the driver is enabled).

arg.name: auth_types
arg.description: JSON array of integers (KADAuthType values) supported by currently loaded drivers. Each value is a bitmask: PASSWORD:1, FINGERPRINT:2, FACE:4, UKEY:8, FINGERVEIN:16, IRIS:32, VIRTUAL_FACE:64, VIRTUAL_CODE:128, VIRTUAL_CODE_NO_CAMERA:256.
